violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employees did not wash their hands before preparing drinks. Hands should be washed before preparing food.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use cups were found on the floor in the storage area. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single-use items were found stored on the floor of the back room. Single-use items should be stored off of the floor.
